requestedDecision: Final adversarial review of the GH-51 change (now including remediation of a prior pass: README wording corrected and the persistence test strengthened with schema-conformance and UUID-filename assertions). Confirm no correctness bug, no broken selector-purity boundary, no schema violation, no exit-code regression, and that persistence never becomes an authorization to transmit or an approval. Read-only.
requiredActions: Reviewer flagged the bundle as not updated, but this is a false positive: dist/rigor.cjs was excluded from the diff shown to the reviewer to limit transmission. The bundle is rebuilt by npm run build (run inside test:all) and git shows it modified; end-to-end run confirmed the rebuilt CLI persists review-decisions.

Schema-conformance test checks declared/required keys but not types/enums/patterns; filename regex is permissive. Non-substantive because the test validates the tool's own randomUUID output, not adversarial input. Accepted as-is.
